name: aidd-overlay
description: Extends the AIDD framework with project-agnostic workflows: interactive codebase quiz (dig), memory maintenance (harvest, reconcile-normative), obsolescence detection (taste), prospective analysis (foresee), performance audits (data-optimize, web-optimize), project health reporting (status), and planning utilities (decompose, journey, changelog, end-plan). Alias chains: rechallenge, afterdev, endtask, endplan, bump-plugin, previously, smarten, skillconf.
